signatures.label: integer dwcontrol.OLEActivate ( long row, integer column, integer verb )

parameters.label: row
parameters.documentation: A long identifying the row location of the Database Blob control in the DataWindow object.

parameters.label: column
parameters.documentation: The column location of the Database Blob. Column can be a column number (integer) or a column name (string).

parameters.label: verb
parameters.documentation: Usually 0, but the verb is dependent on the OLE server.

parameters.label: row
parameters.documentation: A long identifying the row location of the Database Blob control in the DataWindow object.

parameters.label: column

parameters.label: verb
parameters.documentation: Usually 0, but the verb is dependent on the OLE server.
